zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格位于1826.99美元，低于20日均线1852.19美元，显示短期承压偏弱。价格在1832.22至1817.68区间震荡，缺乏明显突破动能，短期趋势呈现震荡下行特征，需要关注能否守住关键支撑。

MACD指标处于-23.32且信号线尚未形成，表明市场卖压依然存在，但空头动能尚未极度强化。缺少RSI数据限制了超买超卖判断，但从价格与均线的关系可推测，短线仍偏向调整，投资者应谨慎跟进。

支撑位关注1818美元附近前低区域，如跌破可能加速下行；阻力位在1852美元及1832美元上方震荡区间顶部，如突破将短期转为上行信号。日内操作应以区间高抛低吸为主，同时留意均线和关键价位的反应。

交易策略上，短线投资者可在支撑附近适度布局多单，止损设置在1815美元以下；反之在阻力位附近适合减仓或短空操作，保持灵活应对震荡行情。长期投资者仍需等待价格企稳突破均线确认趋势再考虑加仓。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading around 1826.99, remaining under pressure after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.16%. Price action is confined within a relatively narrow daily range between 1817.68 and 1832.22, suggesting limited directional conviction in the short term. The broader technical picture remains cautious, as the market continues to trade below key moving-average resistance. Sellers currently maintain a slight advantage, although downside momentum appears controlled rather than aggressive.

The 20-period simple moving average sits at 1852.19, placing the current price approximately 25 points below this benchmark. This positioning indicates a short-term bearish bias and suggests that recent rallies have struggled to gain traction. The MACD reading of -23.31919 further reinforces negative momentum conditions, reflecting underlying weakness in trend strength. While RSI data is unavailable, the combination of price below the SMA and a negative MACD supports a defensive near-term outlook.

From a support and resistance perspective, the session low near 1817.68 serves as the first important support level. A sustained break below this area could expose additional downside risk and potentially accelerate selling pressure. On the upside, initial resistance is located near 1832.22, followed by the more significant barrier around the 20-period SMA at 1852.19. A move above these levels would improve sentiment and signal that buyers are regaining control.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautious stance while Ethereum remains below 1852. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above resistance before pursuing long positions. Alternatively, short-term traders may look for buying opportunities near support if price stabilizes and shows evidence of demand. Risk management remains essential, as a breakdown beneath 1817.68 would weaken the technical structure and increase the probability of further downside movement.
